extortion.description: [AI generated] Casino Essentials is a leading company offering learning and performance management solutions to the gaming industry. They provide e-learning courses about subjects like anti-money laundering, the Bank Secrecy Act, human trafficking prevention, as well as providing software that allows gaming establishments to track and report any suspicious activity. It also offers job-based tools for employee tracking. Their clients include commercial and tribal casinos, card clubs, and lotteries in North America.
